info.title: Gazel.Cli
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2016 - 2024 inventiv
apigen       Generates Client API assembly from remote url or local directory
codegen      Generates Client API source code from remote url or local
directory
schemagen    Generates Schema.json from remote url or local directory
help         Display more information on a specific command.
version      Display version information.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: (Default: Api) Namespace of generated code.

options.name: --class-name
options.description:
(Default: ApiClientContext) Class name of the
client context class and interface from whom other
generated classes will be accessed

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path where generated output will be written. When
not specified, it will be written to the execution
path.

options.name: --decimal-point
options.description:
(Default: AfterTwoDigits) (Possible Values:
AfterTwoDigits | Always) Changes the behaviour of
how Parse and ToString methods of Money class
behaves. (AfterTwoDigits: Use decimal point only
when there are more than 2 digits. 1.15USD will be
115 USD, 1.156USD will be 1.156 USD) (Always:
Always use decimal point. 1.15USD will be 1.15USD)

options.name: --schema-file
options.description:
Schema file name to use a pregenerated schema
file. This option is only valid when local
directory is given in uri or backup-uri. If it
does not have .json extension, it will be added
automatically. If schema-file is given but schema
file does not exist, this option will be ignored.

options.name: --root-namespace
options.description:
Root namespace of module assemblies. This value is
used only when generating from bin directory. If
not provided, first part of -n (--namespace or
--name) option will be used.

options.name: --include-component-name
options.description:
(Default: false) Whether component name should be
included in module names or not. Assume your
assembly is
"MyCompany.Common.Module.Security.dll". When this
value is true, module name becomes
"Common.Security". When this value is false,
module name is "Security".

options.name: --environment
options.description:
(Default: Development) Schema generation from bin
directory is done using a sub process. This value
represents the environment option for that sub
process so that it loads corresponding
`appsettings.[environment].json` configuration
file.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print DEBUG logs

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress all logs

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
ApplicationModel or bin directory where Module
.dll files reside

arguments.name: URI
arguments.description:
Indicate base URL to get
ApplicationModel or bin directory where Module
.dll files reside

arguments.name: BACKUP_URI
arguments.description: When uri fails, backup-uri will be used.

options.name: --name
options.description:
(Default: Api) Name of the system to be
represented by generated schema. Provide a
namespace-like name such as 'MyCompany.MyProduct'
to generate a schema file
'MyCompany.MyProduct.json'.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path where generated output will be written. When
not specified, it will be written to the execution
path.
